findings: Backtest ranking improved over legacy decision-score ranking.
KOSDAQ zero-result was driven first by bad universe quality, not prod/dev threshold drift.
After universe cleanup, reject reasons moved to intentional strategy filters.

Emit dedicated KR reject diagnostics report and trend-by-reason summary.
Increase realized outcome linkage and retrain Phase25 from stronger live labels.
